places.name: Trattoria Luna Rossa
places.notes: Exceptional handmade pasta. The cacio e pepe was perfectly creamy, and the tiramisu was the best I've ever had. Warm, intimate atmosphere with excellent service.

places.name: Sakura Omakase
places.notes: Incredible 18-course omakase experience. Every piece of nigiri was perfection. The chef's attention to detail and seasonal ingredients made this unforgettable.

places.name: Bangkok Street Kitchen
places.notes: Authentic flavors at reasonable prices. The pad krapow and green curry were outstanding. Casual spot with vibrant energy and generous portions.
